name: Meringue Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Beat the egg whites, cream of tarter, and salt together until soft peaks form.
3. Add vanilla, then add sugar gradually, beating until stiff.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for approximately 25 minutes or until dry.
7. Let cool slightly before removing from the parchment paper.
8. Set on a rack to cool completely before storing in an airtight container. Freezes well.
